title: Best of Crime Patrol
subTitle: The police investigate the mysterious disappearance of a boy, Karan. The police find a dead body, which is identified to be Imran's. Karan's parents allege that their neighbours might have a hand in Karan's disappearance.

subTitle: A compilation of some of the most spine-chilling cases from 'Crime Patrol', which investigates murders, kidnappings and thefts among other heinous crimes.
